_comment: Committed goal-seed template for JARVIS O+V strategic memory. Copied to .jarvis/active_goals.json on first boot by GoalTracker._seed_if_available(). Edit to reshape O+V's default strategic direction; delete .jarvis/active_goals.json and re-run to re-seed. Env gates: JARVIS_GOAL_SEED_ON_FIRST_BOOT (default true), JARVIS_GOAL_SEED_FILE (default config/goal_seeds.json).

goals.description: Ship RSI v4 (Wang paper convergence framework) inside Ouroboros — self-improving loop that refines its own prompts, tools, gates and routing from empirical outcomes
Persistent Goal Hierarchy (strategic memory) — schema v3 parent_id, first-boot seeding, ancestor injection into generation prompts, /goal tree REPL
Push Iron Gate from C+ to A via the 4 deterministic gates: exploration-first hard fail, ASCII-strict, L2 repair default-on, pre-APPLY config-format check

Achieve sustained full-pipeline completions in battle-test harness: >5 autonomous ops per session through CLASSIFY -> APPLY -> VERIFY -> POSTMORTEM without captured-client races or infinite gate loops
